ddls:
CREATE TABLE "control_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the control code */,
  "binary_representation" TEXT /* Binary representation of the control code */,
  "octal_representation" TEXT /* Octal representation of the control code */,
  "decimal_representation" INTEGER /* Decimal representation of the control code */,
  "hexadecimal_representation" TEXT /* Hexadecimal representation of the control code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control code and its usage */,
  "standard_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the standard or protocol where the control code is defined */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control code was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the control code (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control code was deprecated */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last usage of the control code */,
  "related_codes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of related control codes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the control code */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the control code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_codes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_codes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_code_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a control code */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control code ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the control code */,
  "binary_representation" TEXT /* Binary representation of the control code in this version */,
  "octal_representation" TEXT /* Octal representation of the control code in this version */,
  "decimal_representation" INTEGER /* Decimal representation of the control code in this version */,
  "hexadecimal_representation" TEXT /* Hexadecimal representation of the control code in this version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control code and its usage in this version */,
  "standard_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the standard or protocol where the control code is defined in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was deprecated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_code_versions_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES control_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_code_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_code_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, system administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
